defs: The act of digressing or deviating, esp. from the main subject of a discourse; hence, a part of a discourse deviating from its main design or subject.
quotes: The digressions I can not excuse otherwise, than by the confidence that no man will read them.

defs: A turning aside from the right path; transgression; offense.
quotes: Then my digression is so vile, so base, That it will live engraven in my face.

defs: The elongation, or angular distance from the sun; -- said chiefly of the inferior planets.
